nasb.text: Moreover, they were speaking about his good deeds in my presence and reported my words to him. Then Tobiah sent letters to frighten me.

esv.text: Also they spoke of his good deeds in my presence and reported my words to him. And Tobiah sent letters to make me afraid.

cnv.text: 不但這樣，他們也常常在我面前提起多比雅的善行，又把我說的話傳給他；多比雅又常常寄信來恐嚇我。

ccb.text: 他们常告诉我有关多比雅的善行，并把我的话告诉他。多比雅不断写信恐吓我。
